'''Traxal 2''' was the second [[Planet/Legends|planet]] orbiting the [[Star/Legends|star]] [[Nubus]] in the [[Nubus system]]. Located in the [[Core Worlds/Legends|Core Worlds]], it was a searing rock.<ref name="CatCW" />
